summary: Project involves a gallery/event space website with booking information and private event pricing.

existing_features.title: In the PrivateEvents component, update the 2-hour rental price to $650 and the 3-hour rental price to $800 for all displayed pricing cards (weekday and/or weekend as applicable).

new_feature_requests.summary: Update private event pricing: 2 hours to $650 and 3 hours to $800
